title: Twitch Chat Control
description: Twitch Chat Control allows your Twitch audience to interact with your Minecraft game by voting on various events, from helpful items to chaotic disasters. Engage your viewers with real-time polls that directly influence your gameplay! 🔥
body:
# Twitch Chat Control

**Twitch Chat Control** is an interactive Minecraft mod that empowers your Twitch viewers to directly influence your gameplay in real-time! Turn your stream into a collaborative (or chaotic) experience where chat decides your fate.

![Logo](https://i.ibb.co/ym5L1nXP/heavy-logo.png)

## 📚 Documentation & Wiki

Detailed guides, commands, and event lists are available on our official Wiki:
**[View the Wiki](https://poule-trempee.gitbook.io/twitch-chat-control/)**

## 🎮 How It Works

Once connected to your Twitch channel, a voting overlay appears on your screen. Viewers can type **1**, **2**, **3**, or **4** in the chat to vote for the next event. When the timer runs out, the event with the most votes is executed instantly!

## ✨ Key Features

*   **Real-Time Voting:** seamless integration with Twitch chat.
*   **A Lot Of Unique Events:** A balanced mix of helpful, harmful, and hilarious effects.
    *   **Helpful:** Heal, Feed, Give Items, Fly, Midas Touch.
    *   **Harmful:** Summon Zombies, Lightning Strike, Drop Inventory, Lava Floor.
    *   **Fun/Chaos:** Shuffle Inventory, Rename Items to Viewer Names, Random Enchants.
*   **Interactive Overlay:** Clean, unobtrusive UI showing active votes and timer.
*   **Configurable:** Adjust timers and settings to fit your stream pace.

## 🚀 Getting Started

1.  **Install** the mod (Requires Minecraft Forge 1.20.1).
2.  **Connect** in-game: `/chatcontrol twitch connect <your_channel_name>`
3.  **Start** the fun: `/chatcontrol start`

## 🔗 Commands

*   `/chatcontrol start` - Begins the voting cycle.
*   `/chatcontrol stop` - Pauses the voting.
*   `/chatcontrol twitch connect <channel>` - Links to your chat.

*Engage your community like never before with Twitch Chat Control!*
